resources.string: See what makes up your balance
Funds you can use for payments right away
Funds being prepared by the private payment system. Processing usually takes around 1-5 minutes

This is the amount you can use for a payment right away.\n\nIt may include funds that are already ready for private sending, funds that can be prepared instantly for a payment, and funds that can be sent now with slightly less privacy.
Why are some funds less private?

Some funds are ready to send, but have not completed all privacy preparation steps yet. If you use them now, they may reveal a little more on-chain information than fully private funds.\n\nTo make them private, you don\'t need to do anything. Just wait — they will become private-ready automatically.

These funds are still being prepared by the private payment system and cannot be sent yet.

They may include funds from recent payments that are still settling, or change that is being made ready for future private sends.

They will become available automatically once processing is complete.
To send %1$s, the remaining %2$s will use lower-privacy funds.
When your ring has insufficient members, part of the amount is sent using vouchers that reveal more information about the sender. Wait for your ring to grow to keep every transfer fully private.
Failed to find application to perform specified action
You have already added this contact
Deposit lost: You didn’t participate in the weekly game
If you still want to play the weekly games, please add a new deposit.
Not participating can lead to your Membership status being put on hold
Issuing your Membership can take a few days, please check back later.
Your Membership is ready to be issued
Membership is within reach. Check the app a bit later, or we’ll notify you when it’s ready.
Syncing and claiming your pending voting rewards
You\’re joining Peers through the Unique Tattoo. Press \“Edit\” to switch to the Weekly Game option.
Switch to the Unique Peer Tattoo Option?
Once you switch, you will need to add a new deposit.\nThe existing deposit will be returned to the original transfer address.
You\'re applying to become a Peer through the weekly game. To switch to the unique tattoo option, press \"Edit\".
Switch to the Weekly Game option?
Cancel your reserved tattoo and register\nto start playing weekly games instead?\n Your game progress will be permanently lost, and your deposit will not be returned!
Edit will be available after the active game you are participating in is finished
Switching is not available after committing to a tattoo design
Select the design for your tattoo
Deposit %s to Choose the Tattoo and Provide Evidence

Procedural designs based on a your unique citizenship number or account address. The designs use algorithmic rules to map the input (e.g., a number or address) into specific aesthetic designs, ensuring both uniqueness and relevance to your individual data.
The Evidence May Contain Sensitive Content or Inappropriate Information
Submit the report if you think the evidence contains sensitive content or inappropriate information.
Failed to vote on the case. It will appear again in the review feed
Failed to report the sensitive content
This case may contain sensitive or inappropriate content.

• Is the Tattoo Design matches the submitted image in terms of design?

• Is the tattoo located on the upper arm between the elbow and armpit?

• Are marks of skin reaction to the tattoo visible in the photo to ensure that it is real?
• Is the Tattoo Design matches the submitted image in terms of design?\n\n• Are marks of skin reaction to the tattoo visible in the video to ensure that the process is real?

Provide Judgments, Earn Rewards

• The app will send you documentation tattoo videos and photos

• Provide ✅ True or ❌ False judgement for each case, earn rewards for each statement

"I hope this message finds you well. I\'ve been admiring your work for a while now, and I\'m interested in getting a custom tattoo from you.
I have a specific design that I\'d like to have placed on inner part of the upper left arm.
Additionally, I would like to document the last three minutes of the tattooing process.
Could we possibly schedule a consultation to discuss the design, placement, and the filming aspect? I’m attaching PDF with more information and details regarding the Tattoo Stencil, Placement, and Evidence video.Looking forward to the possibility of working with you."
The review time can take from %s to %s.
Find any tattooer you like. You will also see a few suggested tattoo studios after booking.
Once your Proof of Ink Evidence is approved, you will receive full reimbursement for your tattoo expenses.
Provide 3-minute proof of documentation video and a picture of the final tattoo
The review time can take from one day to a week
Web3 Citizenship is Issued. Claim Username Now!
We kindly recommend enabling notifications to avoid missing important updates about your evidence processing
Disabling notifications may result in missing important updates, actions that need to be taken, and could overall prolong the evidence upload and review process.
Requested permissions are required to use this screen.
Requested permissions are required to use this screen. You should enable them in Settings.
Inner part of the upper left arm
The tattoo has to be made on inner part of the upper left arm. Centred between armpit and elbow. Location is fixed and can’t be replaced.
The tattoo has to be made on inner part of the upper left arm. Centred between armpit and elbow. Location is fixed and can’t be replaced.
Filming has to be started once most of the tattoo has been performed
Close up picture of the fresh tattoo exposed
The tattoo has to be made on inner part of the upper left arm. Centred between armpit and elbow. Location is fixed and can’t be replaced.
This tattoo is available in several sizes ranging from %s to %s millimeters. You will see stencil with all sizes after booking.
Evidence is being uploaded to the blockchain
Be sure you’re happy with your choice, as the tattoo design can’t be changed after confirmation.
By confirming you’re agree to submit tattoo evidence before %s.
This tattoo is already reserved, select again
Link social media accounts to your citizenship
Your username was reported by users for containing hate speech, violent symbols, or harmful language.
Select the design for your tattoo
Deposited %1$s will be held and sent back after tattoo evidence has been confirmed.
A small deposit is required to prevent game violations and will be fully refunded upon obtaining citizenship.
Earn DOT rewards by reviewing Proof of Ink Evidence.

· Does the film start once enough of the selected design has been tattooed and is clearly visible

 · Is the needle clearly visible enough in the frame during the tattooing process to ensure that it is real?

 · Is the Tattoo Design matches the submitted image in terms of design.

 · Are marks of skin reaction to the tattoo visible in the video to ensure that the process is real?

 · A napkin is often used to wipe off ink traces, making the tattoo area clear for the next line. Is a napkin used in the video?

· Does the film start once enough of the selected design has been tattooed and is clearly visible

 · Is the needle clearly visible enough in the frame during the tattooing process to ensure that it is real?

 · Is the Tattoo Design matches the submitted image in terms of design.

 · Are marks of skin reaction to the tattoo visible in the video to ensure that the process is real?

 · A napkin is often used to wipe off ink traces, making the tattoo area clear for the next line. Is a napkin used in the video?

· Tap the link to go to the profile where the claimed credential is located

 · Compare the information

 · Return to the app to make statement
Watch 10 or more seconds of the video to complete statement

Does the tagline of the
%s
contain the text
%s
?

· Please review the reported username and determine if it includes any of the following:

· Hate speech or slurs (e.g. racism, sexism, homophobia)

· References to violence, extremism, or threats

· Offensive or dehumanizing language

· Symbols or coded terms commonly associated with hate or harm

If the username clearly contains such elements — even indirectly or in disguised form — it can be considered grounds for removal and banning.
Social media and other proof on online activities can be used as proof of your identity required by some apps
Type or paste link to twitter profile you want to add
Type or paste Discord tag you want to add
Type or paste Github profile name you want to add
Your unique Web3 citizen username is your proof of ownership mark. Copy and paste it into your %s profile bio and confirm
The review time can take from one day to a week
The review time can take from one day to a week
Use this name to send and receive all types of payments instead of hard-to remember wallet address.
An account has already been created on this device. You can’t create another one on the same device.
Restore from the existing backup or remove it and create a new one
No backup was found in Google Drive.
By continuing you agree to our %1$s and %2$s
Choose a username to get started.
Claim a username - it\'s how people find, pay, and message you.
The account, money, collectables and all information tied to this backup will be lost unless you\'ve already written down the recovery phrase.
I\'ve written down the recovery phrase for the old account.
Use your device screen lock to verify it\'s you
Import your recovery phrase from a Google Drive backup
Make sure no one can see your screen and do not take a screenshot
Keep your recovery phrase stored in a safe place and never ahare it with anyone
approx. %s will soon be available to withdraw
Reward is expiring in %s. Withdraw it now.
Earn CASH by providing judgements, playing weekly games, or inviting friends
Transfer your DOT rewards to the Polkadot App
Scan or paste the address and make sure it’s correct.
Be sure you’re scanning a Polkadot account address
Your vouchers are being synced right now
Recycling aged coins to keep your wallet healthy
This will cancel any payments that have not been completed yet. Payments that are still pending, processing, or waiting for confirmation will not go through. Completed payments will not be affected.
This action cannot be undone. To send these payments later, you\'ll need to create them again.
Missing this game risks deposit loss.
Wait 24 hours for other players\' attestations to be finalized.
An extra game has been added.
If you don’t want to play games for citizenship, quit anytime and apply with a tattoo and video evidence.
Warning: Your game progress will be permanently lost, and your deposit will not be returned!
The host is unavailable this round, so no gestures can be copied. Please wait for the next round.
Register now to take part in this weeks\'s game
The weekly game starts in 5 minutes! Join for free to win amazing prizes!
The game is about to start! Join and get ready for fun and rewards!
The game is starting! Jump in!
Reminders for when a Video Game is about to start.
Critical alerts with loud sound and vibration for unmissable game events.
Missing the game will pause your citizenship status.
Get your reward once the game ends
Your session is still active.\nRejoin to continue playing.
Once confirmed, participation is required. Missing this game risks deposit loss.
We strongly recommend enabling notifications and alarms to avoid missing games.
Missing games will result in losing your Membership.
Add the upcoming game to your calendar
To make sure never miss a game!
Securely back up your account to Google Drive so you can restore them if lose your device or get a new one.
Your account is backed up to Google Drive. If you lose your device or get a new one, you\'ll be able to restore the account.
We need to access Google Drive to save your backup. Switch it on in your phone settings.
You have another account backed up on Google Drive. You may want to override the existing backup.
You already have another account backed up. Remove it and create a new one or cancel.
Remove the existing backup and create a new one?
If you haven\'t written down the recovery phrase for the account being replaced, you will no longer be able to access it.
Not backed up.\nSet up a backup to stay protected
Never share your recovery phrase or enter it into other apps or websites.
Anyone who has your recovery phrase can access your account.
Make sure nobody can see your screen when viewing your recovery phrase.
Never share the recovery phrase. Anyone with the recovery phrase has full access to your account, cash and collectables.
Judge the case to unlock %d More
Thank you for contributing your judgments. You\'ve completed all available cases. The app will notify you when new cases appear.
Tap and watch at least 10 seconds of the video to make your judgement
Watch 10 seconds of the video to make your judgement
Use your ID to start a chat or\nreceive digital dollars.
Show this QR to someone who wants to add you as a contact or send you money
This device will be connected to your account and synced securely:
Chats and messages will be available
Send and receive messages from this device
Remove this device at any time in Settings
You can\'t add more than %1$d devices. Disconnect one of the devices to add a new one.
Something went wrong. Please try again.
%1$s will lose access to your chats.
You can manage this later in Settings.
Network access is required to communicate with external services. %1$s
%1$s would tike to access accounts of %2$s
Account access is required to read account data. %1$s
%1$s would Like to Access Your Balance
Balance access lets the product see funds available for spending. %1$s
%1$s Would like to know your identity
This reveals your primary username to the product. %1$s
The detected amount differs from the amount stated by the product.
%1$s would like to access the camera
Camera access is required to take photos. %1$s
Bluetooth access is required for nearby device communication. %1$s
%1$s would like to access the microphone
Microphone access is required to record audio. %1$s
Notification access is required to send you alerts. %1$s
NFC access is required for tap interactions. %1$s
%1$s would like to access your location
Location access is required to determine your position. %1$s
%1$s would like to access the clipboard
Clipboard access is required to read or write copied data. %1$s
Biometric access is required for authentication. %1$s
%1$s would like to open external links
The app will open links in your browser or other apps. %1$s
WebRTC access can reveal your IP address to remote peers. %1$s
Signed transactions will be broadcast to the blockchain. %1$s
Statements will be published to the statement store. %1$s
Preimages will be uploaded to the bulletin chain. %1$s
The scanned QR code is not recognized
Point your camera at the QR code on your computer
Unsupported message content. Please update the app.
Are you sure you want to disconnect %s?
Notifications are currently turned off. You can enable them in settings
Message requests from people who aren\'t in your contact list appear here.
Wait for %s to accept your message request.
Add %s to your contacts to accept the chat request. They won\'t know you\'ve seen their message until you accept.
You can only send one message in this request.
Wait for %s to accept your request message before sending the next message.
Tap other players who also copy the gesture
The environment was updated and your account no longer exists on-chain. You\'ll need to start fresh.\n\nThe app will close after tapping \"Start Over\" — please reopen it manually.
Start a conversation with someone \nby typing their username
Add a contact\nand start a chat with\n%1$s
After you enter the chat, make sure %1$s starts one with you as well, or your message may not be seen.
You can\'t add yourself as a contact
Couldn\'t load search results.\nPlease try again.
Wait for the player to read or reply to your\nmessage before sending the next message
You will be able to start chatting with this player once they also add you to their contacts.
Amount received differs from amount sent
%1$s shared a push token with you
You shared a push token with %1$s

Join as a Polkadot Peer!

🎰 Participate in Weekly Prize Draw
👤 Choose a Short Username
🔒 Enjoy Free, Private Transfers
💎 Experience Premium Service Level across all Polkadot products
💵 Seize the opportunity for daily paid contributions.
Option 1. Play a Weekly Game. Requires Constant Participation.\n\n🤖 Attest humans, remove AI in a 5 minute game
Option 2. Get a Unique Free Tattoo. One and Done Option.\n\n✍️ Get Inked with Any Artist You Like and Provide a 3 Minute Video Documenting the Tattoo Process
Polkadot Peers have premium access to many Polkadot services such as Academy Membership and many more
As a Polkadot Peer, you get premium service levels, participate in weekly prize draws, enjoy free private transfers, choose a short username, and have opportunities for daily paid contributions.
Feel free to explore the chat options or reach out to our support team for any additional questions you may have about becoming a Polkadot Peer.
Win cash prizes by playing a free, fun and quick game.
During the Web3 Summit, you jump into a two minute game with five other people. The game is easy, copy gestures from other players and make your own.
Why gestures? Bots can’t copy them live. Playing proves you’re a real person.
How to play in two simple steps:\n1. Copy the gesture
2. Tap other players who also copy the gesture
Play once to get your Membership and your chance to win a cash prize! Just by playing you also get rewarded with exciting collectibles.
Deposit %1$s and join the weekly game
Deposited funds will be held from you CASH account and sent back after you become a Member.
It may take up to a little while to process.
Thanks for playing! See you next time.
Play %s more games in a row to become a Polkadot Member.
Play %s more games in a row to resume your Membership status.
This one got away. Your next chance awaits
Become a Peer by Getting a Unique Free Tattoo\n\n✍️ Get Inked with Any Artist You Like and Provide a 3 Minute Video Documenting the Tattoo Process

📐 Size. This tattoo is available in several sizes ranging from 25 to 50 millimeters. You will see stencil with all sizes after booking.\n\n💪 Tattoo Location. The tattoo has to be made on inner part of the upper left arm. Centred between armpit and elbow.
🎨 Design. Add a small $10 deposit to select your unique design from over 2,000 options available.
📆 Execution. Find any tattooer you like. You will also see a few suggested tattoo studios after booking.
🤳 Evidence. Provide 3-minute proof of documentation video and a picture of the final tattoo
🗳️ Review. Tattoo Evidence is reviewed by other Polkadot peers, who will vote individually based on your documentation video evidence.\n\n💸 Reimbursement. Get Your Tattoo Expenses Refund
Select and Reserve a Unique Tattoo
I\'m at the tattoo studio now
Evidence has been provided, wait for the upload and review. This process can take anywhere from one day to a week.
Issuing Peer status can take some time

You’ve reserved your unique tattoo design, now it’s time to make it happen! Share the design PDF with anyone you consider to do the tattoo, discuss the details, and make sure to capture video evidence of the process.
💸 Don’t forget, tattoo expenses will be reimbursed, so go ahead and spend your funds; you’ll get them back once your evidence is approved.
Send PDF with stencil to any tattoo artist you want. Also it contains additional instructions how to provide photo and video evidence

Provide Photo and Video Documentation

🤳 Film the process while getting a tattoo. You can either ask for assistance or use the in-app camera to film yourself.

🎦 Begin filming once the majority of the tattoo has been completed, ensuring that the chosen design is clearly visible.

⏱️ Film closer moments when making tattoo lines over the stencil image

🔄 Film 3 minute video without breaks

📸 Take a picture of the fresh tattoo exposed
⏺ Evidence 1/2. The documentation video comes first. Press the "provide" button when you’re at the tattoo studio and ready to start filming with the in-app camera.
📸 Evidence 2/2. Photo Evidence.\nTake a picture of the fresh tattoo exposed using in-app camera.
Tap to see more and start uploading the video evidence.
Issuing Membership. Tap to see more.
How Should I Film the Evidence?
What happens after I submit the evidence?
Open the chat for each option to explore
Get Inked and Provide a 3 Minute Video
Play a free, fun and quick weekly game.
Earn by reviewing tattoo documentation videos
Actions will be available after you finish updating your balance
If it differs from the previous value, press Update until correct
Private accounts don\'t support automatic syncing. Manually updating your balance helps keep it accurate.
Once you close this, manual update won\'t be available again
Please review the details of your transaction and try to send it again
Send %s on the %s to your wallet address below.
Don’t close the app until the process is complete, or you may lose funds.
Funding complete, check your balance, spend dollars in the Polkadot app.
If you have pending funds, closing the screen may result in the loss of those funds
Pick a theme that feels like yours. You stay in control.
Hey, are you going to Web3Summit? 🎉
Wouldn\'t miss it 👋 See you there!
Scan the QR code on your\ncomputer or another device to sync
Your phone approves all devices.\nNo one can access your account without your permission
Are you sure you want to leave\nthe chat with %1$s?
They won\'t be able to send you a message request or call you.
You won\'t receive any messages and requests until you unblock %1$s
Urgent notifications when games are about to start
As a member, you\'re eligible for a clean username without a suffix. Claim it for free
As a Member, you are eligible for a clean username without a suffix. How cool!
Keep playing to retain your Membership, win prizes, and get other perks!
Couldn\'t process your Membership. Please try again.
Record the video while the tattoo is being executed, not before or after.
The tattoo must be in progress—the stencil and the partially inked design must both be clearly visible.
All footage must be recorded directly through the app\'s built-in camera.
Your video must be filmed without any pauses or cuts. If you stop, the recording will restart from the beginning.
You may film in any style you prefer, as long as the tattoo execution and the overall design are clearly shown.
You can ask someone to help you film, or record it yourself.
Your phone\'s battery is required to be at least %s charged for filming evidence
Your phone storage needs to have at least %s of free space for filming evidence
Take the photo directly through the app’s built-in camera.
Make sure the entire tattoo is clearly visible in the photo.
You may ask someone to take the photo for you or take it yourself — what matters most is that the tattoo is fully visible.
Uploading begins after tattoo photo evidence is submitted
You played the game together on %s
Thanks for playing! Play %d more to become a Member
Your Membership has been suspended.\nYou cannot make judgements until you reclaim it.
Collectibles are temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
Web3 Summit ended — stay tuned for more updates!
Do you want to share \"%s\" info with them?
Tap on the Humans Who Copied 👇
You won\'t receive a reward for this game
Keep playing to resume your Polkadot Membership, sign up for next weeks game.
Keep playing to become a Member, sign up for next weeks game.
Play a Weekly Game. Requires Constant Participation.\n\n🤖 Attest humans, remove AI in a 5 minute game
🤙 Gesture. As a host perform a hand gesture, as a player mimic another host’s gesture
🤖 Attestation. Identify humans playing the game with you. Remove AI.
🏃 Play 6 games in a row to achieve your Polkadot Peer status.
❣️️ Attendance. Attendance is important, missing the game pauses Peer status. Game has to be played constantly.
🕰️ Game Time! The game is played every Thursday at 6 PM CET.
